'''''Pizzazz'' 4''' is the fourth issue in the [[Marvel Comics]] popular culture monthly magazine. This issue was cover-dated [[January]] [[1978]] and featured the continuation of the serialized ''[[Star Wars]]'' comic ''[[The Keeper's World]]''.<ref name="Issue 4" />

This issue included an advertisement and order form for [[Marvel Special Edition Featuring Star Wars 1|''Marvel Special Edition Featuring Star Wars'' 1]] and [[Marvel Special Edition Featuring Star Wars 2|''Marvel Special Edition Featuring Star Wars'' 2]].<ref name="Issue 4" />
